title: what the bloody hell
wikitext:
[]: ...what the bloody hell?             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 30, 2008 6:59 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1xEEuCtuflY Trance remix of Komm, Susser Tod. It actually makes the dissonance between the lyrics and the music even more striking. Seriously, this is fucking weird

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Sep 30, 2008 7:02 pm I'll agree with you and contribute a 'wat'.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 30, 2008 7:25 pm Weird but kinda cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Sep 30, 2008 7:32 pm Pure FAIL, IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Sep 30, 2008 7:38 pm wow....wow....Best. Dance. Song. EVAR. where the heck do i download this?!

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Tue Sep 30, 2008 9:00 pm Fuckwin.

[]:             Quote Post by Rhyno » Tue Sep 30, 2008 9:47 pm I like it. I also like the original song. I vote for win.

[]:             Quote Post by p06 » Wed Oct 01, 2008 4:55 am the tweaked voice reminds me of sarah kerrigan.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Oct 01, 2008 6:23 am I like it! She doesn't sound that much like Sarah Kerrigan, IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Oct 01, 2008 10:22 am I don't think it's all that great, just different. I prefer the original.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed Oct 01, 2008 10:53 am HAI Guy's! I heard there was a Rave here, so I brought some Baby Pacifier's, Glow Stick's, Pill's and Shroom's!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Oct 01, 2008 11:42 am ^ Oh man I am sooooo thirsty! And soljerameelguy, I love you man, I really do!

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Wed Oct 01, 2008 11:42 am soljerameelguy wrote: HAI Guy's! I heard there was a Rave here, so I brought some Baby Pacifier's, Glow Stick's, Pill's and Shroom's!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Oct 01, 2008 12:10 pm Awesome?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed Oct 01, 2008 12:11 pm Awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Wed Oct 01, 2008 1:10 pm What Takumi would listen to as he drives off a cliff with Natsuki tied up in the boot....

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed Oct 01, 2008 1:12 pm Dartz wrote: What Takumi would listen to as he drives off a cliff with Natsuki tied up in the boot....

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Wed Oct 01, 2008 1:58 pm I like it; or rather, I prefer it to a lot of the dance music currently out there. Personally, I'd be very happy if this came on in a club. Party on!! EDIT: Looking through the smiley menu while listening to this track is more than a little lol-worthy!

[]: Re: ...what the bloody hell?             Quote Post by Silent Lightning » Wed Oct 01, 2008 2:23 pm I actually don't mind it. I also found the black&white suits vaguely attractive...

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Wed Oct 01, 2008 2:33 pm CRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAPCRAP
